title: Build Systems, Not Code - Angie Jones, Agentic AI Foundation
summary: Angie Jones argues that AI coding agents elevate software engineering from line-by-line coding to systems-level design. Engineering discipline remains essential through systems thinking, decomposition, and state management, repositioning developer value in an AI-native world.
writeup: Angie Jones argues that AI coding agents shift software engineering away from line-by-line coding toward systems-level design. The talk holds that engineering discipline stays essential through systems thinking, decomposition, and state management, even as agents write more of the code. It frames the developer's value in an AI-native world around architecting multi-agent systems, separating concerns, and managing context rather than producing individual lines.
